text:
Created attachment 193044
patch to update the port

- Update 1.9 --> 1.10
- Fetch dist from github, where the upstream actually works.
Changes: https://github.com/openxpki/Crypt-PKCS10/commits/master
- "portlint -AC" just gives non-relevant warnings.
- Tested with poudriere 3.2.99.20180328 at 11.1-release-amd64 with perl 5.26.2
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail say: "PASS".
